name: chatbot
description: Scripts de desenvolvimento local (API + web + opcional gateway). Requer Node e Go no PATH.

scripts.docker:dev:api:rebuild: node scripts/docker-compose-exec.js infra/docker-compose.dev.yml --profile api build --no-cache api && node scripts/docker-compose-exec.js infra/docker-compose.dev.yml --profile api up -d --force-recreate api
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -n api,web "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:stack:whatsapp: node scripts/docker-compose-exec.js infra/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d && concurrently -n api,web "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:stack:gw: concurrently -n api,web,gw "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:gw"
scripts.tts:local: concurrently -n omnivoice,kokoro "npm run omnivoice:server" "npm run kokoro:server"
